rationale: gpt-5 is also the within-family stability anchor used in Exp 1B (per spec_models_v1.0 §4.2 and experiment_design_v1.3 §2.2). Feeding gpt-5's projection into the projection_driven executor input keeps the projection-driven executor on the same family whose stability is independently characterized.

The alternative — each example uses its own family-specific projection from the cross-family run — is operationally messier and introduces an additional confound between projection-divergence and execution-effect; reserved as an ablation for the main run.

alternatives_considered.reason_rejected: No within-family stability run; harder to disambiguate within-model variance from cross-family divergence.
Same reason as gemini-pro; reserved for cross-family Exp 1 only.
Anthropic-excluded per spec_models_v1.0 §2 — would re-introduce executor-projection coupling on the same vendor as the executor (claude-opus-4-7).

deviation_protocol: Any change to this projection family choice requires a version bump of this file (`_projection_choice_v2.json`) and a corresponding sync entry in CHANGELOG.md.
